title.en: The Manta Python instantly killed Ye Tian, who ...

content.en:
Rumble!!!!!

The Manta Python instantly killed Ye Tian, who was rushing here.

Although the two sides are still far away, they will fight in an instant.

"Nine Awakenings of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord!"

Ye Tian held the Reincarnation Treasure and instantly cast the Heavenly Poke Divine Power and attacked the Manta Giant Python.

Thundered!!!!

The two sides immediately fought together.

The strength of this Manta Giant Python is not very strong, that is, the Ordinary Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Level, and it is not Ye Tian's opponent.

Burst!

The Heavenly Piercing Light instantly pierced the body of the Manta Python, this is an attack that contains the rules of the Supreme Dao, once it is injured by the rules of the Supreme Dao, it is difficult to recover from the injury.

Now.

The Manta Python felt that the wounds on his body were difficult to heal at all, and immediately sent a message to several other Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, asking them to help him.

And it was extremely puzzled why Ye Tian's strength was so strong.

It was very clear about the rules of reincarnation of the Purple Abyss, and the eight awakenings of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the outside world could not enter here, let alone the Nine Awakenings of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

If the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords could enter here, they would have swept away the Reincarnation Purple Abyss long ago.

"This outsider's cultivation has not reached the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm, but his strength is comparable to the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord!"

Manta python enlightened.

That's when it happened.

Several of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies shot out in unison and attacked the Manta Python.

"Is this a clone?"

The Manta python was shocked.

There are several creatures in the reincarnation of the purple abyss that have the ability of clones, but if the clones are killed, it is difficult to recover, and those creatures are very weak.

At present, among the nine awakening Origin Upper Realm overlords of Reincarnation Ziyuan, none of them have a clone.

And Ye Tian not only has so many clones, but the strength of each clone is the same, which is very terrifying.

"This guy alone is comparable to several Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords!"

The Manta python panicked.

"Heavenly Poke!"

"Heavenly Poke!"

"Heavenly Poke!"

Ye Tian has cast a heavenly poke.

Puff puff puff!!

The Manta python was poked out of holes one after another, and the injuries were not light, but not fatal.

The Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord wants to kill the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and the difficulty is not small, unless the gap is really too big, it can be easily killed.

Like Ye Tian, even if several copies of the body work together, if he wants to kill the Manta Python, it will take a lot of time.

Rumble!!!!

A venerable Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Creature came, all to save the Manta Giant Python.

"Four Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, the number is okay!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, this is just a treasure land, and four Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords were born, which is already terrifying, and it also proves that there are really a lot of resources here!

"Kill him!"

The Manta python shouted.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian fought with these four Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Creatures.

And among them, there was a Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord's strength was stronger than Ye Tian's, he was not an opponent, he could only barely support it.

However, they didn't want to kill him easily.

......

"Several of my replica bodies have already held back these four Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord creatures, I can now go and harvest the resources on their territory!" Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

Another copy of his body sneaked to the rest of the core area, trying to hide his breath.

These four Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords were fighting with his other replica bodies, and naturally they couldn't spy on the existence of this replica body.

Core area.

"This area is a medicine garden!"

Ye Tian saw unimaginable resources.

【Reincarnation Heavenly Source Flower】

【Fruit of the Dao Heart】

【Reincarnation of Tiangang Vine】

One precious thing after another is in this area, and it is very dense, and it is likely that one of them is the medicine garden, which was transplanted here.

Although the years of these resources are still not long enough, they are also of great value to Ye Tian.

"Collect them all!"

Ye Tian took these resources away.

Moreover, some resources were not very useful to these Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord creatures, but they were extremely useful to him.

He will be able to make full use of these resources!

Subsequently.

He continues to scrape resources in the core area.

The area of the core area is not too large, and Ye Tian's speed is also relatively fast.

With the passage of time, a large amount of resources were swept away by Ye Tianshu.

"There are really too many resources in the core area of the Reincarnation Purple Abyss, this time it's the right one, so many resources are enough to raise my cultivation to the limit of the sixth balance, and then I can go to the seventh balance!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

And quickly.

The Manta python found that their nest seemed to be ended.

"Not good!"

They tried to return to their lair, but Ye Tian tried his best to prevent them from leaving.

In desperation, they could only continue to fight Ye Tian.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian's several replica bodies have been severely damaged, and these four Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords are also not lightly injured, especially the Manta Giant Python, which is also in a seriously injured state, and it is difficult to recover.

"Almost!"

Ye Tian was ready to sacrifice these duplicate bodies to kill the Manta Giant Python and another seriously injured Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

After all, he exposed himself this time, and naturally wanted to kill them.

At present, it is not easy for the two powerful Nine-Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords to be killed, so they have to kill these two weak ones first.

When he reaches the seventh balance, he will kill them at will.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian began to fight for his life, and when he caught the Manta python, he attacked wildly.

It didn't take long.

One of Ye Tian's replica bodies fell, but the Manta Giant Python was also on the verge of death, and the other nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords were unable to save it.

A little more passed.

The Manta python fell and died.

Then, Ye Tian began to kill another Nine-Time Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Creature.

And after sacrificing a replica body, he finally killed this overlord of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm.

At this point, the reincarnation of Ziyuan fell two Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and Ye Tian lost several replica bodies.

Maybe on the side of the reincarnation Ziyuan, they have earned, but Ye Tiancai is really making a big profit, so he has nothing to lose!

Moreover, his other replica body has already collected a lot of resources and left.
